title: Hyderabad Biryani & Beyond Trail

poi.name: Chutneys
poi.transcript_evidence: Their paper dosa and pesarattu are legendary. Pure vegetarian place with amazing chutneys.
poi.visual_evidence: Sign reading 'CHUTNEYS Pure Vegetarian Banjara Hills'

stops.notes: Arrive early to avoid breakfast rush. Pure vegetarian - perfect for your preferences.

poi.name: Paradise Biryani
poi.transcript_evidence: First stop - Paradise Biryani on MG Road. This place has been serving the best biryani since 1953.
poi.visual_evidence: Sign reading 'PARADISE BIRYANI Since 1953 MG Road, Secunderabad'

stops.travel_from_previous: 8.5 km, ~25 mins driving from Banjara Hills
stops.notes: They have a separate vegetarian biryani that's excellent. The veg dum biryani uses the same slow-cooking technique.

poi.name: Nimrah Cafe & Bakery
poi.transcript_evidence: Last stop - Nimrah Cafe at Charminar for Irani chai and Osmania biscuits. Perfect ending!

stops.notes: Cash recommended. Enjoy the view of Charminar while sipping chai. Both items are vegetarian.

tips: Start early at Chutneys for the best breakfast experience
Hyderabad traffic can be heavy - allow extra travel time between stops
All three stops have vegetarian options matching your preferences
Carry cash for Nimrah Cafe - they may not accept cards
Shah Ghouse was skipped from the itinerary as it's primarily non-vegetarian
